page_metadata.biotools__summary: The COMBAT-TB Workbench is an IRIDA based, module workbench for M. tuberculosis bioinformatics. It is designed to be easily deployed on a single server.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The COMBAT-TB Workbench is an IRIDA based, module workbench for M. tuberculosis bioinformatics. It is designed to be easily deployed on a single server.
